title: callicarpa americana f. lactea
intro: Callicarpa americana f. lactea is a rare, pink-berried variant of the American Beautyberry plant, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Callicarpa americana f. lactea may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its potential health benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
